positive: A celestial journey silhouette. A group of stylized animals (fox, owl, fox, deer) are gathered on a crescent moon, gazing up at a stylized nebula and constellations. The style is clean, bold linework, reminiscent of Nordic folklore mixed with retro scientific diagrams. Deep indigo, cosmic purples, vibrant gold, and teal color palette, with primary focus on high-contrast silhouettes against a gradient background. Perfect central composition, minimal detail surrounding the central group, suitable for repeat pattern or single placement on apparel. Vector art quality, perfect symmetry, crisp edges, graphic design focus. --ar 1:1
